# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

# [YAML Header]
apiVersion: '2' # or 1 if not using v3 schema (disabled)
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: envoy-proxy-configmap
data:
    admin.address : "0.0.0.0"   # Admin interface address and port for health checks, statistics endpoint(default is localhost). For production use the external IP or hostname of your Envoy proxy server instance where traffic should end up in case any subset failover (disabled if not needed)
    admin.port : "15000"        # Admin interface address and port for health checks, statistics endpoint(default is localhost). For production use the external IP or hostname of your Envoy proxy server instance where traffic should end up in case any subset failover (disabled if not needed)
    access_log.path : "/tmp/access-%Y-%m-%d:%H%.m%M%.s". # Path to write the requests and responses for statistic visualizations
